title: Lazy Sunday Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with coriander and crunchy vegetables, perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon.

ingredients.name: Lazy Sunday lazy stir-fry seeds
ingredients.notes: any type of seeds (e.g., sesame, sunflower)

ingredients.name: Citrusy sauce (e.g., soy sauce, orange juice)

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the coriander and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the crunchy vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the lazy stir-fry seeds and citrusy sauce. Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional coriander if desired.
